name: etechflow/module-admin-reindex
description: Run Magento indexers from the admin browser instead of CLI. Adds a 'Reindex' mass action + 'Reindex All' button to System → Tools → Index Management. No SSH required. Hyvä / Magento Open Source / Adobe Commerce compatible.

suggest.etechflow/module-next-day-eligibility: Part of the eTechFlow module bundle — one bundle key activates every eTechFlow module.
